CustomField.description: Specifies who receives error notifications. Can be set to "All Sys Admins" to notify all users with the System Administrator profile, or to a specific User ID to notify a single user. Only applies when Error Notifications is enabled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Who receives error notifications: "All Sys Admins" or a specific User ID. Only applies when Error Notifications is enabled.
CustomField.label: Error Notification Recipients
